hero_title: All your classroom resources in one place
hero_subtitle: Browse by course, book, band, and unit. Open the original file, view the unit page, or jump into the Prep Room with annotations.
empty_state: No resources are configured yet. Once your tracks and units have resources, they will appear here.
//_aliases: Legacy keys still used by older markup – map them to the same copy
resources_page_subtitle: Browse by course, book, band, and unit.
resources_resources_hint: Choose a unit and resource to preview or open it in the Prep Room.
resources_preview_no_resource_text: Choose a unit to browse its resources, then select one to preview it here.
resources_browser_subtitle: Scan the available materials, select one, then use the preview panel for actions.
resources_browser_empty_text: Choose another unit or add resources in Sanity for this unit.
resources_shelf_recent_empty: Open a resource and it will appear here.
resources_shelf_last_session_empty: Resources used in your latest session will appear here.
resources_shelf_prepared_empty: Open a resource in Prep Room to mark it prepared.
picker_subtitle: Navigate by course, book, band, and unit to find the resource you need.
resources_picker_subtitle: Navigate by course, book, band, and unit to find the resource you need.
picker_hint: Pick a resource from this unit to open it in the preview and Prep Room.
preview_empty_body: Use the filters on the left to select a course, book, band, unit, and resource.
prep_empty_body: Select a resource from the picker to start preparing your session.
prep_no_preview_body: This resource can’t be previewed here. Try opening the original link instead.
prep_no_resource_body: Open the resources page and choose a resource to prep.
prep_not_found_body: We couldn’t find this resource. It may have been removed or the link is invalid.
prep_notes_placeholder: Write your talking points, timing, and reminders here…
pdf_error_engine: Could not load the PDF engine.
pdf_error_missing: The PDF file could not be found.
pdf_error_invalid: The file is not a valid PDF.
pdf_error_network: Network error while loading the PDF.
pdf_error_no_file: No PDF file URL was provided.
resources_prep_empty_text: Choose a resource from the list to start working with it.
resources_export_failed: We couldn’t export this page. Please try again.
resources_clear_confirm_message_page: This will remove every annotation on page {page}. You can undo this right after clearing.
resources_clear_confirm_message: This will remove every annotation from this resource. You can undo this right after clearing.
resources_viewer_no_preview_text: You can still open the original file using the button on the left.
resources_pdf_engine_error: There was a problem loading the PDF engine.
resources_pdf_load_generic_error: We couldn’t load this PDF file.
resources_pdf_missing_error: The PDF file could not be found.
resources_pdf_invalid_error: This PDF file appears to be invalid or corrupted.
resources_pdf_network_error: Network error while loading the PDF. Please check your connection or try opening the original file.
resources_pdf_no_file: No file URL was provided for this resource.
